commit.message: Update OOM behavior and task manager + watchdog behavior
Update task manager cause we stoopid smh :(
Minor comment and debug print changes
Fix issue with watchdog task creation

Make startup_count volatile

The while(startup_count < wait_time) loop in startup_timer.c had been
looping infinitely. Putting a statement in the loop fixed it at first,
but we surmised that the real issue was compiler optimization of the
startup_count variable. Making it volatile seems to have fixed the
issue...
Add nop to RTC startup to keep compiler from optimizing delay
Add additional idle mode for boot handling
Fix swapped if statement in watchdog.c
